about.title: About Me
about.description1: I am Gabriel Vereda, a web developer passionate about creating modern and functional solutions. Curious by nature, I always seek to understand how things work and turn ideas into well-structured code.
about.description2: My journey began with personal and freelance projects, evolving into certifications and technical training in Systems Development. Today, I am focused on growing as a Full Stack developer and contributing to impactful projects.

steps.2025: Freelance Projects in HTML, CSS and JS

resume.name: Gabriel Vereda
resume.description: Practical experience in developing and maintaining websites, focused on functional, responsive, and well-structured solutions. Seeking first formal opportunity in the market.
